post.title: Reading as an Active Operation
post.intent_statement: Argue that reading should become an operation the reader performs, not content the reader receives.
post.central_question: What changes if a page can be thought with, not just read?
post.core_insight: The unit of reading shifts from the page to the passage you choose to act on.
post.body_html:
Most reading interfaces assume one entry, one order, one isolated page. But thought has recurrence, revision, and relationship.

An AI-native reader treats a passage as a starting point for cognition: remember it, challenge it, project from it, branch to a related thought.

The interface should stay quiet until the reader acts. AI is summoned from focus, never pushed onto the page.
